message:
test(core): comprehensive test expansion for search explainability (search_explain.rs)

Adds 391 lines of new tests to search_explain.rs covering serde
roundtrip fidelity, plain-text rendering edge cases, and diagnostic
accuracy across the full SearchExplain API surface.

New test coverage:
- Serde roundtrip: SearchExplainReason, SearchExplainEvidence, and
  SearchExplainResult all serialize/deserialize correctly with
  expected JSON field names and types.
- render_explain_plain() output validation:
  - No-issues case: "No issues detected" + "looks healthy" messaging
  - Pane filter display: shows "Pane filter: <id>" when scoped
  - Multiple reasons: each reason's summary, confidence, evidence
    keys, and suggestions all appear in rendered output
  - Zero-segment edge case: handles total_segments=0 gracefully
  - High-confidence reason rendering: confidence values display
    correctly at boundary values
- Evidence formatting: key-value pairs render as "key: value" in
  plain output
- Suggestions rendering: actionable suggestions appear as bullet
  points in the "Suggestions:" section

These tests harden the search explainability system against
regression during ongoing pattern engine and storage layer changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
